name: SpecialToMovie
description: Automatically detects TV specials that are also standalone movies, creates hard links in your movie library, and syncs watch status bidirectionally.
overview: Detects TV specials that are also movies, creates hard links, and syncs watch status.

versions.changelog: Cache TMDB/TVDB 404 responses to avoid repeated failed API calls (configurable TTL, default 7 days). Fix Linked Pairs table overflowing the screen on narrow viewports.

Delegate item deletion to Jellyfin instead of manual file operations. Improve two-way deletion UI with clearer warnings. Fix info disclosure in API test endpoints. Add search debounce and movie cache for single-episode processing.
Fix hard link failure on long file paths (Win32 MAX_PATH limit). Rename plugin display name to Special To Movie.
